headline: CPC Biotech Introduces One-Inch Flow Path, Single-Use Sterile Disconnect for Bioprocessing
summary: CPC Biotech, part of PSG and Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading manufacturer of connectors, pumps, and flow sensors used in biopharmaceutical processing, today announced the launch of the RevolveSD™ Series. The new one-inch, single-use product enables sterile disconnection of bioprocess tubing in fewer steps than traditional methods that rely on clamps or sealers. RevolveSD disconnects allow bioprocessors to complete sterile disconnections in seconds, while also reducing setup time.
